sentences.arabic: يَصِفُ الْأَدَبُ الْعَرَبِيُّ الطَّبِيعَةَ بِصُوَرٍ خَيَالِيَّةٍ جَمِيلَةٍ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Arapska književnost opisuje prirodu veoma lijepim maštovitim slikama.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic literature describes nature with very beautiful imaginative images.

sentences.arabic: يُشَبِّهُ الشَّاعِرُ الْوَجْهَ الْحَسَنَ بِالْقَمَرِ الْمُنِيرِ فِي السَّمَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Pjesnik poredi lijepo lice sa sjajnim mjesecom na nebu.
sentences.translationEn: The poet compares a handsome face to the shining moon in the sky.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يُشَبِّهُ الْكَرَمَ بِالْبَحْرِ الْوَاسِعِ الَّذِي لَا يَنْتَهِي.
sentences.translation: Također, on poredi plemenitost sa prostranim morem kojem nema kraja.
sentences.translationEn: He also compares generosity to the vast sea that never ends.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الصُّوَرُ الْبَيَانِيَّةُ تَجْعَلُ النَّصَّ أَكْثَرَ تَأْثِيرًا فِي الْقَلْبِ.
sentences.translation: Ove slikovite figure čine tekst upečatljivijim za srce.
sentences.translationEn: These rhetorical images make the text more impactful on the heart.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَحْتَاجُ إِلَى الْخَيَالِ لِنَفْهَمَ جَمَالَ الْعَالَمِ مِنْ حَوْلِنَا.
sentences.translation: Potrebna nam je mašta da bismo razumjeli ljepotu svijeta oko nas.
sentences.translationEn: We need imagination to understand the beauty of the world around us.
